EmailBody:
Good morning,

We received our latest order of Amoxclav 500mg and noticed that several tablets in the blister packs are discolored and crumbling. The batch is LOT-2025-A4471. Could you please advise how to proceed? We have quarantined the affected stock.

Kind regards,
J. Peeters

Hello,

The outer cartons of order SO-558244 arrived with crushed corners and three boxes had broken tamper seals. Batch LOT-2025-B1180. We need confirmation that product integrity is not compromised before we release to pharmacies.

Thanks,
QA Team MedPlus

Dear Pharmacovigilance team,

A patient reported severe skin rash and difficulty breathing approximately 30 minutes after taking Cardiostat 10mg from batch LOT-2025-C0093. This is being reported as a suspected adverse drug reaction. Please initiate the appropriate investigation. Patient is stable.

Dr. Vermeulen

Hi,

The refrigerated shipment for SO-557844 arrived with a temperature excursion logged at 14C for an estimated 6 hours. Cold-chain product from batch LOT-2025-A4471 may be affected. Awaiting your stability assessment.

Logistics, Pharma Wholesale

Beste,

De bijsluiter in de verpakking van Paracetamol 1g (batch LOT-2025-D2210) vermeldt een verkeerde dosering voor kinderen. De informatie komt niet overeen met het etiket op de doos. Graag dringend nakijken.

Met vriendelijke groeten

Dear Sir/Madam,

We have identified product purporting to be Neurocalm 25mg with batch LOT-2024-X9921 that does not match the holographic security features of genuine stock. We strongly suspect counterfeit product entering the supply chain and request an urgent investigation.

Compliance Office, GlobalPharm

Hello,

Follow-up on the gritty texture issue in Amoxclav suspension, batch LOT-2025-B1180. As discussed, we are awaiting your CAPA documentation. Affected units remain in quarantine in our warehouse.

Regards,
J. Peeters

Hi team,

Closing the loop on the leaking bottle issue from order SO-557501 (batch LOT-2025-E5540). Replacement stock received and the root cause report on the cap-sealing line was satisfactory. Thank you for the quick resolution.

Warehouse Ops

Dear team,

Second report this week of nausea and dizziness associated with Cardiostat 10mg batch LOT-2025-C0093. Given the earlier ADR report we believe this warrants a batch-level review. Please advise on next steps.

Hospital Pharmacy, UZ Leuven

Hello,

We received an extra case of product we did not order on SO-558350 and one expected item was missing. Not strictly a quality issue but please advise on returns and correction. Batch on the extra case is LOT-2025-F7781.

Thanks!

Dear Quality team,

The expiry date printed on the secondary packaging of batch LOT-2025-D2210 is smudged and partially illegible on roughly 1 in 20 cartons. We need clarification before dispensing. Holding stock pending your response.

QA, BioCare

Bonjour,

Closing complaint regarding pallet damage in transit for SO-557420 (batch LOT-2024-X9921). Credit note received and carrier claim settled. No product quality impact confirmed. Merci.

Service Client, PharmaPlus

Dear team,

Re: foreign particles observed in Amoxclav vials, batch LOT-2025-A4471. Investigation confirmed and we understand a CAPA is in progress on the filling line. Please share the preventive action plan timeline.

Dr. Haentjens

Hallo,

Enkele blisterverpakkingen in batch LOT-2025-E5540 zijn niet goed verzegeld; de folie laat los. Graag advies of we de voorraad mogen gebruiken of moeten retourneren.

Groeten, Inkoop Apotheek West
